{{Infobox character
| name = Divide
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Divide]] is an entity [[Shadow Ark]] does not want to deal with.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Divide]] is an adaptive power of the [[Zenith Blade]] that grants abilities based on the user's chosen opponent.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Divide]] is a character who has boarded a different ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Divide]]'s [[sword]] dissolved when he sighed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I don’t want to deal with Divide, all right?” Ark said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Divide and his new human boarded a different ship than the one we’re on. They’re taking us somewhere, but it’s impossible to tell where.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
